{{< include _setup.qmd >}}

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeHeader"}
{{< include _header.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeTextIntroduction"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_introduction.Rmd")
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeTextPatientPopulation"}
::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\FloatBarrier
:::

```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_patient_population.Rmd")
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeFigBirthWeight"}
{{< include figures/_fig-bw.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeFigGestationalAge"}
{{< include figures/_fig-ga.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeTextNosocomial"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_nosocomial_infections.Rmd")
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeTblIncidenceDensity"}
{{< include tables/_tbl-incidence-density-rates.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeTblDeviceAssociated"}
{{< include tables/_tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeTextInfectiousAgents"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_infectious_agents.Rmd")
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeTblAgentPerInfection"}
{{< include tables/_tbl-agent-per-infection-rate.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeTblAbrInfection"}
{{< include tables/_tbl-abr-infection-rate.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeTblInfectiousAgentDetection"}
{{< include tables/_tbl-infectious-agent-detection-rate.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeTblResistanceTest"}
{{< include tables/_tbl-resistance-test-rate.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeTextRiskFactors"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_risk_and_protective_factors.Rmd")
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeTblRiskDensity"}
{{< include tables/_tbl-risk-density-rates.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeTextSurgery"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_surgery.Rmd")
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeTblSurgicalProcedure"}
{{< include tables/_tbl-surgical-procedure-rates.qmd >}}
:::
